speaker: Laura Schrager
words: Lola Barnes. Trimble moved to Princeton from Nebraska with her parents and brother in 1913 at the age of ten. She married Hershel Trimble when she was 17, but remained close by her parents on Harrod Creek. On this tape, Lola describes the move to Princeton School's days, chores at home, courting and dances. She also talks about her life When Herschel worked in the woods and the neighbors building the schoolhouse for their children.
